RelationshipTypeOntology.rdfs:label: PWMO Complete Relationship Type Registry
RelationshipTypeOntology.description: All typed relationships used in the PWMO radar knowledge graph. Every relationship is explicitly directional, typed, and carries metadata.

partOf.description: Component is a physical part of a radar system

integratedWith.description: Radar is integrated in weapon system

interfacesWith.description: Physical or data interface between components

instanceOf.description: Specific radar is instance of class

variantOf.description: Radar is variant of another system

detects.description: Radar is capable of detecting this target class

classifies.description: Radar can classify (identify type of) this target

illuminates.description: CW or pulsed illumination for semi-active homing

provides_cueing_to.description: EWR provides cueing data to FCR

counteredBy.description: Radar is threatened/countered by this ECM

Organizational_Level_O.description: Unit-level maintenance; operators and organic technicians
actions: LRU swap if BIT indicates fault

Direct_Support_Level_DS.description: Brigade/Division level; shop repair of LRUs returned from O-level

General_Support_Level_GS.description: Corps/Army level; heavy repair and major overhaul

Depot_Level_Maintenance.description: Manufacturer or national depot; full rebuild, major upgrade

MTBF.rdfs:label: Mean Time Between Failures
MTBF.note: AESA graceful degradation means system MTBF much higher than component MTBF; system continues with degraded (but functional) performance

MTBCF.rdfs:label: Mean Time Between Critical Failures
MTBCF.note: Subset of failures causing mission abort; higher than MTBF for systems with graceful degradation

fixedSite.description: Permanent hardened installation; max power; best coverage; fixed target

semiPermanent.description: Transportable but not routinely moved; concrete pad; may have some hardening

manPortable.description: Carried and operated by small team; very short setup

Survivability.dispersion: Network of radars; no single point of failure
Survivability.silentMode: EMCON (Emission Control); use passive sensors while primary radar silent
Survivability.underground: Protect antenna on surface; electronics underground

SupplyChain.singlePointOfFailure_risk: Many Western radars depend on TSMC or Samsung for advanced node chips; supply chain vulnerability

repairPartsStockage.authorizedStockageLists: ASL specifies which parts a unit holds; based on failure rates and MTTR
repairPartsStockage.warbuild: War Reserve Materiel (WRM); prepositioned spares for sustained conflict

RadarEquation.rdfs:label: Radar Range Equation (Single Pulse)
RadarEquation.formula: P_r = (P_t * G_t * G_r * lambda^2 * sigma) / ((4*pi)^3 * R^4 * L_sys)

variables.G_r: Receive antenna gain (= G_t for monostatic)

RadarEquation.solvedForRange: R_max = ((P_t * G^2 * lambda^2 * sigma) / ((4*pi)^3 * S_min * L))^(1/4)
RadarEquation.insight: Range varies as 4th root of power; doubling power only increases range by 19%

SearchRadarEquation.formula: P_avg * A_e * T_S / (4 * pi * Omega_S) = S_min * R^4
SearchRadarEquation.description: Radar search equation: average power times aperture times scan time / solid angle = min detectable signal times range^4
SearchRadarEquation.insight: Search performance depends on P_avg * A_e product (power-aperture product)

DopplerShift.example_X_band: At 10 GHz, 1 m/s radial velocity → 66.7 Hz Doppler shift

RadarCrossSection.rdfs:label: Radar Cross Section (RCS)
RadarCrossSection.definition: Effective area of target intercepting and isotropically re-radiating incident wave: σ = lim(R→∞) 4πR² * |E_r|²/|E_i|²

Resonance_Mie.behavior: Oscillatory RCS vs frequency; RAM most difficult here
Resonance_Mie.radarRelevance: VHF/UHF radar exploits resonance region of stealth aircraft (~10m wingspan → resonance at ~30 MHz to 300 MHz)

stealthDesignPrinciples: Angled surfaces deflect energy away from monostatic receiver
Radar Absorbing Material (RAM) converts RF to heat
Edge alignment reduces edge diffraction RCS
Cavity design for inlet, cockpit, exhaust
Internal weapon carriage eliminates store RCS

AtmosphericRefraction.standardRefraction: 4/3 Earth radius effective model; increases radar horizon by ~15% vs geometric
AtmosphericRefraction.superRefraction_ducting: Temperature inversion; radar energy trapped near surface; anomalous propagation
AtmosphericRefraction.subRefraction: Elevated radar horizon; reduced coverage at low altitudes

Multipath.description: Two-ray propagation: direct path + reflected path from surface. Interference pattern creates lobing at low elevation angles.
Multipath.effectOnLowAltitude: Pattern propagation factor can cause 20-40 dB sensitivity loss at certain elevation angles

GainFromAperture.insight: Larger aperture = higher gain = narrower beam = better angular resolution

BeamwidthFromAperture.formula_3dB_rad: theta_3dB ≈ 0.886 * lambda / D  (uniform aperture; narrower with taper)

AntennaPhysics.DiffractionLimit: Angular resolution fundamentally limited by Rayleigh criterion: Δθ_min = 1.22 * λ / D

SignalProcessingPhysics.NyquistSampling: ADC must sample at ≥ 2x maximum signal frequency to avoid aliasing
SignalProcessingPhysics.PulseCompression_TimeBandwidthProduct: TBP = B * tau; compression ratio = TBP; processing gain = 10*log10(TBP) dB
SignalProcessingPhysics.CoherentIntegration_SNR_gain: N pulses coherently integrated → SNR gain = N (10*log10(N) dB)
SignalProcessingPhysics.NoncoherentIntegration: N pulses noncoherently integrated → SNR gain ≈ sqrt(N); less efficient but tolerates phase instability
SignalProcessingPhysics.CFAR_threshold: P_fa = (1 + T/N)^{-N} for CA-CFAR; threshold T set for desired P_fa
SignalProcessingPhysics.RangeResolution: delta_R = c / (2B) where B is compressed bandwidth

AIMetadataOntology.rdfs:label: AI Training Metadata, Semantic Tags, and Inference Support

InferenceRules.StealthDetection: IF radar.frequency IN [VHF, UHF] AND target.wingspan_m > 5 THEN detection_probability SIGNIFICANTLY_HIGHER than X_band
InferenceRules.ARMVulnerability: IF radar.emitting=true AND threat.ARM_enabled=true AND radar.sidelobe_level > -35dB THEN ARM_acquisition_probability HIGH
InferenceRules.BurnThrough: IF jammer.power_W > radar.sensitivity_W * (4*pi*R²/lambda²/G) THEN radar.detection_impossible UNTIL R < burn_through_range
InferenceRules.PassiveDetection_VHF: IF radar.band=VHF AND target.RCS_optical < 0.001 THEN target.RCS_VHF may_be 0.01_to_1 (resonance effect)

sarImageLabels.connectionToStructDiff: PWMO defines target classes and physical properties that should inform SAR image annotation for StructDiff training
sarImageLabels.despecklingRelevance: Physical scattering models (surface, volume, double-bounce) inform what StructDiff should preserve vs remove during despeckling

CountryInventorySummary.rdfs:label: Estimated Country Radar Inventory Summary (Open Source)

OTHR: Sky Wave OTHR (claimed, South China Sea coverage)
